entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Feynman-tutor

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Die Feynman Tutor AI-leermodus is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: probeer 'n konsep eenvoudig te verduidelik. Jy tutor ziet hiaten, stelt vrae en help jou die verduideliking weer op te bouwen.

entries.value: Sluit af deur uit wat geheugen 'n opsomming in vijf bullets te skryf en vraag daarna na wat ene swak plek om more te herhalen.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.

entries.source: Finish with a quiz, flashcard, or Socratic check so the session leaves a trace.
entries.value: Sluit af met 'n vasvra, flitskaart of Sokratiese kontrole zodat die sessie 'n spoor achterlaat.

entries.source: Finish with evidence of learning.
entries.value: Sluit af met bewyse dat er geleerd is.

entries.source: Finish with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a project step, or a study routine.
entries.value: Sluit af met terug-verduidelik, 'n vasvra, 'n flitskaart, 'n projekstap of 'n studieroetine.

entries.value: Eerste besluiturt: {value1}

entries.source: First-principles learning
entries.value: Leren vanuit eerste principes

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Eers bepaal die tutor die doel. "Ik wil opportuniteitskoste besluitgrijpen" is iets anders dan "Ik moet hierdie ekonomie-huiswerkvraag oplossen" of "Ik moet 'n standpunt in 'n debat verdedigen." Die doel bepaal die vrae.

entries.value: Flitskaartbouer

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Flashcard Builder-prompts en studielus

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: flitskaartgenerering

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards is 'n van die eenvoudigste manieren om hierdie te doen.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards is krachtig, maar hulle is nie wat hele studieproses. Hulle is die beste vir retrieval, woordeskat, definities, formules, onderscheidingen en belangrike voorbeelde. Hulle is swakr wanneer die leerder die idee in die eerste plek nog nooit wat verstaan.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards werk die beste wanneer hulle een idee tegelyk toetse, antwoorde pas na inspanning tonen en gemiste kaarte vinnigler herhalen.

entries.source: For
entries.value: Vir

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Vir 'n dieper roete lees jy die Flashcard Builder-gids en die Flashcard Builder-prompts en studielus. Die doel is nie 'n mooie set kaarte. Die doel is meer onthou wanneer die aantekeningen weg is.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Vir 'n leerder kan dat heel anders voel dan zoeken op wat web. Soeken geeft bladsye. 'n leercompagnon geeft 'n pad.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Vir 'n breer beeld van hoe die openbare bladsye verbanden, bekyk jy die AI-leerkaart, die vakhubs of die AI-leerpromptbiblioteek. Die bladsye is ontwerp om wat produk begrijpelijk te maak vir leerders en vindbaar vir soekenjins, sonder die nuttige deel agter 'n rekeningmuur te verbergen.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.

'n leerder wat 'n stad bestudeert, kan begin met Geography Explorer om die plek te besluitgrijpen en daarna doorgaan na 'n histories gesprek.

entries.source: For teachers
entries.value: Vir onderwysers

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Vir wat eers werd 'n voormalige kolonie sonder eerdere nasionale geskiedenis 'n wereldmacht. Die koningen en koninginnen van Europa werden omvergeworpen, en die Verenigde Staten van Amerika kwamen na voren as symbool van demokrasie, kapitalisme en 'n vrye wereld. Tegelijk ontstond 'n nuwe ideologie van wat communisme en werd die Sovjet-Unie daarvan die praktiese belichaming.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stel elke vraag en leer via duidelike verduideliking, voorbeelde, vervolgprompts en geduldige AI-begeleiding.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stel vrae, daag idees uit en leer geskiedenis via gefundeerde gesprekken met openbare figuren uit wat verleden.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: brainstorm oor projeken, stories, ontwerpen, titels, eksperimente en onverwachte invalshoeken.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bring 'n passage of boekidee in en bou begrip op via opsommings, woordeskat, gevolgtrekking en gesprek.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bou 'n tijdelijk paspoort, doorloop wat reisadvies en verken 'n historiese wereld via scène, kaart, tijdlijn, mense, regels, inventaris en bewyse.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bou woordeskat op met betekenis, voorbeelde, uitspraakaanwijzingen, geheugensteuntjes en kort oefening.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap feiten, lijsten, toespraken of reeksen om in memorabele mentale scènes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: maak 'n studieplan rondom jy tijd, energie, doelwitte en swak plekken.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: debatteer oor elke onderwerp, word uitgedaagd, vergelyk beweringen en leer sterker argumente maak.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap in 'n realistiese casus, neem besluiten, zie gevolg en leer wat principe agter elke keuse.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: beoordeel artikelen, beweringen, video's of posts op bewyse, bias, betroubaarheid en ontbrekende konteks.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: verken kunswerken, style, kunsenas, visuele keuses en wat 'n beeld krachtig maak.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: verken loopbane via interesses, vaardighede, voorbeelde uit 'n werkdag en volgende stappe.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: verken lande, stede, riviere, klimaten, migratie, hulpbronne en hoe geografie wat lewe vormt.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: verken identiteit, kennis, geregtigheid, vryheid, geluk en ander diepe vrae via zorgvuldig redeneer.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: genereer 'n gefokusde meerkeusevasvra oor elke onderwerp en bespreek die verduideliking na elke antwoord.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: kom emosioneel los, vind 'n kleiner volgende stap en bou sonder skuldgevoel weer momentum op.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: kom los by huiswerk met ethische wenke, voorbeelde, kontroles en stapsgewyse afrigtering.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: verbeter skryf met beplanning, revisie, struktuur en terugvoer wat jy eie stem intact laat.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: leer deur te doen, te sien, te vergelyk, te hervra en beheersing te besluitwysen. Die app bou rondom jy doel 'n lewendig lescanvas in plaas van instructie te verander in 'n lank chat. Probeer: "Leer my financial modeling."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: leer oor grondwette, demokrasie, verkiezingen, regbanken, regte, plichten en openbaar beleid.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: leer noten, akkoorden, toonladders, ritme, idees vir gehoortraining en hoe liedjes is gebou.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: leer via gefokusde vrae, wenke en reflectie in plaas van passief antwoorde te lees.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: laat leer aanvoelen as 'n spel met quests, levels, punte, uitdagingen en eindbaasrondes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bring in kaart hoe idees verbanden, van oorzaken en gevolg tot categorieën, voorbeelde en teenstrijdigheden.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: merk op wat jy help leer, wat in die weg zit en hoe jy 'n sterker leerder word.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: oopmaak 'n gedeelde werkruimte met 'n AI-samenwerker. Maak 'n ruwe uitwerking, wissel bewerkingen uit, daag swak plekken uit, verduidelik besluiten vast en eindig met konkrete vooruitgaanng.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: plak 'n vraag, jou antwoord en eventueel die verwagte antwoord. Jy buddy legt die redenasie uit en help jou dieselfde fout die volgende keer te vermy.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: plak data, grafiekbeschrijvingen of resultaten en leer wat hulle betekenen, wat hulle nie betekenen en wat jy daarna moet vrae.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: plan 'n skool-, kreatiewe, kodeer- of persoonlik projek met scope, mylpale, blokkades en volgende aksies.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: plan en voer kort herhaalsessies uit wat wat langetydperkgeheugen versterken.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: plan veilige demonstraties, begrijp variabelen, voorspel uitkomsten en redeneer vanuit bewyse soos 'n wetenschapper.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: speel met marken, schaarste, prikkels, beleid en persoonlike financiën via eenvoudige simulaties.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: oefen 'n taal in realistiese scenario's soos cafés, onderhoude, reizen en wat dagelijks lewe, met correcties na elke beurt.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: oefen argumenteren deur met 'n openbare of fictieve persoonlikheid te debatteren oor 'n onderwerp dat jy kies.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: oefen onderhandeel, conflict, klantendiens, leiderschap of elke gesprek met hoge instap.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: oefen mondeling's, mondelinge eksamens, projekverdedigingen en vinnigle vervolgvrae met kalme terugvoer.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bereid jy vir op skool-, stage-, baan- of beursonderhoude met realistiese vrae en terugvoer.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bereid toespraken, aanbiedings, onderhoude of mondelinge eksamens vir met prompts, timing en terugvoer op struktuur.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: se wat jy denkt dat er gebeurt, en jy buddy diagnosticeert verborge wanopvattings met zachte tests.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: probeer 'n konsep eenvoudig te verduidelik. Jy tutor ziet hiaten, stelt vrae en help jou die verduideliking weer op te bouwen.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap 'n breed onderwerp om in navorsingsvrae, zoektermen, outlines en bronnotas.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap konsepte om in stories, personages, conflicten en memorabele scènes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap intenties om in klein herhaalbare leergewoontes met triggers, beloningen en herstelplannen.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap aantekeningen of onderwerpe om in gefokusde flitskaarte met wenke, antwoorde, voorbeelde en veelvoorkomde valkuilen.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: stap jy syllabus, examendatum, tijd en swak areas om in 'n prakties studieplan.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: begrijp kode, debug foute, leer programmeerconcepten en bou klein projeken stap vir stap.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: ontleed historiese gebeurtenissen via oorzaken, aanleidingen, gevolg en alternatieve mogelijkheden.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: werk algebra, calculus, redaksiesommen en wiskundige konsepte stap vir stap deur met 'n AI-afrigter.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: werk dilemma's deur deur belanghebbenden, gevolg, plichten, regte en afwegingen te wegen.

entries.source: For Time travel, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Vir Time travel is 'n nuttige oefenlus:

entries.source: For Viva Practice, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Vir Viva Practice is 'n nuttige oefenlus:

entries.value: Vir Vocabulary Builder is 'n nuttige oefenlus:

entries.source: For Writing Coach, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Vir Writing Coach is 'n nuttige oefenlus:

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Vir skryf beteken dat Writing Coach gebruik om 'n stelling, struktuur of paragraaf te verbeter terwyl jy eie stem behou bly. Vir kode beteken wat Code Tutor gebruik om foute te verduidelik, jy te jou te vra om uitset te voorspel en jy te help ontfout in plaas van 'n volledige oplossing te plak. Vir eksamens beteken wat Exam Prep Planner gebruik om te bepaal wat jy eers moet herhalen en hoe jy jezelf test.

entries.source: Format this website in MLA
entries.value: Formateer hierdie webwerf in MLA

entries.source: Format, flag missing data, and explain how to verify the source details.
entries.value: Formatteer, markeer ontbrekende data en verduidelik uit hoe jy die brondata kan verifiëren.

entries.source: Foundational guides for explanations, tutoring behavior, study habits, prompt quality, and choosing the right learning mode.
entries.value: Basisgidsen vir verduideliking, tutor-gedrag, studiegewoontes, promptgehalte en wat kiezen van die regte leermodus.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Grondslae

entries.source: Founded
entries.value: Opgefokus

entries.source: Fourth, the tutor asks one next-best question. Not five questions. Not a lecture. One move that keeps the learner thinking.
entries.value: Ten vierde stelt die tutor een beste vervolgvraag. Geen vijf vrae. Geen college. Een stap wat die leerder aan wat dink houdt.

entries.value: Formuleer vrae en sintetiseer bronne

entries.value: Formuleer vrae en vat bronne saam.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic
entries.value: Gratis AI-vasvramaker vir elke onderwerp

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Gratis AI-vasvramaker vir elke onderwerp is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: kies 'n onderwerp en krijg 'n gefokusde meerkeusevasvra van 10 vrae. Jy beantwoordt een vraag tegelyk, krijgt directe terugvoer en eindigt met 'n score en bespreking.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic: practical guide
entries.value: Gratis AI-vasvramaker vir elke onderwerp: praktiese gids

entries.value: Genereer 'n weeklikse of maandelikse leerverslag met poging, uitkomste, struikelblokke, suksesse en 'n gefokusde plan.
